blocks.text: Title race, Merseyside derby, Bahrain GP: the season's biggest Sunday
Arsenal sit 6 points clear — but City have a game in hand. Win at the Etihad and the gap is 3. This is the match that could define the title race.
🏎️ 17:00 — Bahrain Grand Prix: Antonelli leads (72pts), Russell 9 back as the 2026 pecking order takes shape

blocks.label: Coming up
items: 🎮 Mon 02:00 — IEM Rio 2026 Major kicks off — Norwegian legend rain hunting CS2 glory
🎾 Mon 09:00 — Barcelona Open begins — Ruud opens clay season on home turf
⚽ Tue 21:30 — Real Madrid vs Alavés — Los Blancos must win to close 9-point gap on Barça
